title: Algebraic Structure, Equations, and Inequalities · Decision Notebook: Algebra Equivalence
summary: Build a tariff and break-even calculator with piecewise constraints. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int algebra equivalence increment in an audited tariff and break-even model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Transform expressions and equations while stating domain restrictions and preserving equivalence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
